title: NodeCapacity
content:
# NodeCapacity

Set of information about the Node's capacity.


## Properties

- **cpu** (`string`): Number of CPU cores available on the Node.
- **ephemeral-storage** (`string`): Amount of ephemeral storage available on the Node.
- **memory** (`string`): Amount of memory available on the Node.
- **pods** (`string`): Maximum number of Pods that can be scheduled on the Node.
summary: Set of information about the Node's capacity.

cpu.description: Number of CPU cores available on the Node.

ephemeral-storage.description: Amount of ephemeral storage available on the Node.

memory.description: Amount of memory available on the Node.

pods.description: Maximum number of Pods that can be scheduled on the Node.

schema.description: Set of information about the Node's capacity.
